Index.title: Master Solana Development
Index.description: Learn to build on Solana with interactive courses.

Hero.subtitle: Learn how to write your own on-chain programs from the top builders in the Solana ecosystem.

Gamification.description: Level up your character. Grow skill trees. Stack combos. Complete daily quests. Earn loot. Climb the arena leaderboard. Every line of code is an attack.
Gamification.title: Title
Gamification.dailyBonus: Daily bonus: Complete all quests for

LearningPaths.description: Each quest line is an RPG campaign. Defeat bosses, earn soulbound loot, and prove your mastery on-chain.
LearningPaths.solanaFundamentalsDesc: Accounts, transactions, programs, and the runtime model.
LearningPaths.solanaFundamentalsLongDesc: Master the Solana runtime, understand accounts, craft transactions, and deploy your first program. The foundation every builder needs.
LearningPaths.anchorFrameworkDesc: PDAs, CPIs, Token-2022, Metaplex Core, and full-stack dApps.
LearningPaths.anchorFrameworkLongDesc: Build, test, and deploy production programs with Anchor. Master PDAs, cross-program invocations, Token-2022, and Metaplex Core NFTs.
LearningPaths.defiDeveloperLongDesc: Build production DeFi protocols from scratch. AMMs, lending markets, oracle integration, liquidation engines, and MEV protection.
LearningPaths.solanaSecurityDesc: Audit programs, find vulns, secure protocols.
LearningPaths.solanaSecurityLongDesc: Become a security expert. Learn to audit Solana programs, find vulnerabilities, build exploit PoCs, and secure protocols against attacks.

Features.description: Every interaction earns rewards. Every milestone unlocks new abilities. This isn't a tutorial — it's a quest.
Features.xpLevelingDesc: Earn soulbound XP tokens on Solana for every lesson and challenge. Your power grows with every line of code.
Features.soulboundNftsDesc: Earn evolving Metaplex Core NFTs that upgrade in-place as you progress. Proof of mastery, on-chain.
Features.streakSystemDesc: Maintain daily streaks. Hit milestones at 7, 30, and 100 days. Streak freezes for when life happens.
Features.leaderboardDesc: Compete with builders worldwide. Weekly, monthly, and all-time rankings derived from on-chain XP.
Features.achievementsDesc: Unlock 256 achievements across progress, skills, streaks, and community. Five rarity tiers from Common to Legendary.
Features.codeChallengesDesc: Write Rust and TypeScript in-browser with real-time test feedback and instant XP on completion.

Testimonials.description: 12,400+ builders leveling up. Here's what the top-ranked players think.
Testimonials.rafaelQuote: I went from zero Solana knowledge to deploying production programs in 8 weeks. The XP system made me genuinely addicted to learning. Currently on a 45-day streak.
Testimonials.mariaQuote: The boss challenges are insane. Hardest coding tests I've done, but the NFT credentials you earn are legit — I got hired at a Solana protocol partly because of them.
Testimonials.lucasQuote: Duolingo for blockchain, except you actually build real things. I check my streak every morning. The battle pass rewards keep me coming back.
Testimonials.anaQuote: The achievement system is so satisfying. I have 32 badges and I'm hunting for the legendary 'Speed Runner' one. The community on Discord is amazing too.
Testimonials.pedroQuote: I compete with my friends on the leaderboard every week. We've formed a guild and do the daily quests together. Best learning platform I've used.
Testimonials.sofiaQuote: The Anchor track is chef's kiss. I earned the Anchor Expert NFT and it's now my most prized on-chain credential. Actually got me an interview at a top DeFi protocol.

CTA.description: Join 12,400+ builders leveling up their Solana skills. Earn XP, unlock achievements, and claim your soulbound credentials.

Footer.description: The ultimate open-source learning platform for Solana developers. Build, ship, and earn on-chain credentials.
Footer.solanaDescription: Powered by Solana blockchain for XP tokens, credentials, and verifiable achievements.
Footer.copyright: echo "© 2024 Superteam Academy. Open Source under MIT License."

Auth.linkAccountsDesc: Connect multiple auth methods. Use any of them to sign in.
Auth.walletRequiredDesc: Link a Solana wallet to finalize courses and receive soulbound NFT credentials on-chain.
Auth.allAccountsLinked: All accounts linked! You can sign in with any method.
Auth.sidebarDescription: Complete quests, earn XP, unlock soulbound loot, and climb the leaderboard.
Auth.signUpToActivate: Sign up to activate your player card
Auth.createAccountDesc: Create your account to earn XP, unlock achievements, and build on Solana.
Auth.signInDesc: Sign in with any linked auth method to continue your journey.
Auth.byContinuing: By continuing, you agree to our

Dashboard.noEnrolledCourses: You haven't enrolled in any courses yet.

Profile.xpLockedDesc: Finish your active courses to unlock this XP and level up faster!
